global_description: Large feline with muscular body, orange fur with black stripes, white underbelly, powerful limbs, long tail, and a broad head with sharp teeth and whiskers.

part_details.head: Broad with sharp teeth and whiskers
part_details.body: Muscular with orange fur and black stripes
part_details.fur: Orange with black stripes and white underbelly

spatial_relations: Limbs attached to sides of body
